characters.appearance: Young woman in her 20s, slim build, fair complexion. She has long, dark, slightly wavy hair with bangs. Her facial features are soft and natural.
characters.wardrobe: A sheer, long-sleeved white button-up blouse worn over a plain white top.
characters.demeanor: Earnest, expressive, and friendly, using natural hand gestures to emphasize her story.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Can I get a cold coffee, please? [Can I get a cold coffee, please?]
Character A says: Can I have a cold coffee? [Can I have a cold coffee?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, real-world speaking scenario (ordering coffee).
- Demonstrates the app's core functionality of voice-based practice.
- Establishes a practical, everyday tone right away.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ practice करो, confidence से बोलो (Practice daily, speak with confidence)
अब आपकी बारी... (Now your turn...)
Can I get a cold coffee, please?
Can I have a cold coffee?

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: एक बार कैफे में मैंने वेटर से कुछ आर्डर किया, [Once in a cafe I ordered something from the waiter,]
Character A says: पर English में ठीक से बोल नहीं पाई, बहुत awkward लगा। [but couldn't speak properly in English, it felt very awkward.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core pain point: feeling embarrassed or awkward in public due to poor spoken English.
- Builds empathy with the target audience through a highly relatable Indian cafe scenario.
- Sets up the emotional stakes for the user's learning journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova User Sneha (Supernova User Sneha)
Supernova
एक बार कैफे में मैंने वेटर से कुछ आर्डर किया (Once in a cafe I ordered something from the waiter)
पर English में ठीक से बोल नहीं पाई, बहुत awkward लगा (but couldn't speak properly in English, it felt very awkward)
Q. आपको Supernova की ज़रूरत क्यों महसूस हुई? (Q. Why did you feel the need for Supernova?)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: तब मुझे लगा कि fluent English बोलना कितना ज़रूरी है। [Then I felt how important speaking fluent English is.]
Character A says: स्कूल में सालों English पढ़ी, पर बोलने की practice कभी नहीं हुई। [Studied English for years in school, but never practiced speaking.]
Character A says: जब भी बोलने का time आता, तो hesitation होती और शब्द ही नहीं मिलते थे। [Whenever it was time to speak, there was hesitation and I just couldn't find the words.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Deepens the problem by touching on the common Indian experience of learning English grammar in school but lacking speaking practice.
- Validates the user's struggle, removing blame and framing it as a lack of practice rather than a lack of intelligence.
- Transitions the narrative from frustration to the active search for a solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova User Sneha (Supernova User Sneha)
Supernova
तब मुझे लगा कि fluent English बोलना कितना ज़रूरी है (Then I felt how important speaking fluent English is)
स्कूल में सालों English पढ़ी, पर बोलने की practice कभी नहीं हुई (Studied English for years in school, but never practiced speaking)
जब भी बोलने का time आता, तो hesitation होती और शब्द ही नहीं मिलते थे (Whenever it was time to speak, there was hesitation and I just couldn't find the words)
Q. Supernova ने आपकी कैसे मदद की? (Q. How did Supernova help you?)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: दोस्तों के साथ बाहर जाते वक़्त [When going out with friends]
Character A says: 'क्या आप मेरी एक अच्छी फोटो खींच देंगे?' मैं हमेशा ऐसे पूछना चाहती थी ['Could you take a nice picture of me?' I always wanted to ask like this]
Character A says: Supernova के AI tutor ने मुझे exactly यही real-life sentences सिखाए। [Supernova's AI tutor taught me exactly these real-life sentences.]
Character A says: अब मैं कहीं भी, किसी से भी confidently English में बात कर सकती हूँ। [Now I can confidently speak in English with anyone, anywhere.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Presents Supernova's AI tutor as the practical solution for learning real-world phrases.
- Uses a fun, universal example (asking for a photo) to show that learning can be immediately applied to daily life.
- Delivers the emotional payoff: transforming hesitation into confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova User Sneha (Supernova User Sneha)
Supernova
दोस्तों के साथ बाहर जाते वक़्त (When going out with friends)
'क्या आप मेरी एक अच्छी फोटो खींच देंगे?' मैं हमेशा ऐसे पूछना चाहती थी ('Could you take a nice picture of me?' I always wanted to ask like this)
Supernova के AI tutor ने मुझे exactly यही real-life sentences सिखाए (Supernova's AI tutor taught me exactly these real-life sentences)
अब मैं कहीं भी, किसी से भी confidently English में बात कर सकती हूँ (Now I can confidently speak in English with anyone, anywhere)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: बिना डरे English बोलना सीखें, Supernova के साथ। [Learn to speak English without fear, with Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear, encouraging Call to Action (CTA).
- Reinforces the brand promise of speaking without fear.
- Displays the app interface to build trust and show the product in action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Real-world English practice के लिए (For real-world English practice)
आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करें! (Download Supernova today!)
Supernova
AI Tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करें (Practice daily with AI Tutor)
The weather is nice today. (आज मौसम अच्छा है।)
Interview, Office, Travel (Interview, Office, Travel)
Hello! I see you're wearing a classic
